/usr/bin/g++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Tolitica.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Tolitica.dir/Tolitica_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Tolitica.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Tolitica.dir/widget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Tolitica.dir/core_functions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Tolitica.dir/Tolitica_autogen/EWIEGA46WW/qrc_visualElements.cpp.o -o Tolitica  /usr/lib/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.16 /usr/lib/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.16 /usr/lib/libQt5Core.so.5.15.16
